General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Rashmi Gajare and Marcie Farwell
Date completed:
February 2015
EAD encoding:
Evan Earle, February 2015
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, January 2016
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Forest Hills Gardens is a planned residential community which was developed by the Russell Sage Foundation in 1908. Laid out on 175 acres in Queens, New York, the community's site plan was designed by Frederick Law Olmsted, Jr.; many of the houses were designed by Grosvenor Atterbury.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Brochures, specifications, declarations of restrictions, and blueprints of homes in Forest Hills Gardens.
RELATED MATERIAL
See also Forest Hills Gardens Corporation Records, ( #2775).
General
Abbreviations used in the collection
1st = First Floor Plan
2nd = Second Floor Plan
2nd, A. = Second Floor Plan, Attic Plan,
2nd, R. Pl. = Second Floor Plan, Roof Plan
3rd = Third Floor Plan
A. = Attic Plan
B. = Basement Floor Plan
B. 1st = Basement Floor Plan, First Floor Plan
B. Pl. = Block Plan
Bldg. = Buildings
C. = Cellar Plan
C. Sc. = Cross Sections
D. = Details
E. = East Elevation
Ele. = Elevation
En. Ele. = End Elevation
Ext. = Exterior Elevation
F. = Front Elevation
Fou. Pl. = Foundation Plan
G. = Grounds
Gar. = Garage
Grd. Pl. = Grading Plan
H. Pl. = Heating Plan
Int. Ele. = Interior Elevation
L. Sc. = Longitudinal Sections
Lf. Ele. = Left Elevation
Lf. Sd. = Left Side Elevation
N. = North Elevation
P. Pl. = Plot Plan
Plb. Pl. = Plumbing Plan
Plb. Sc. = Plumbing Section
Prelim. Sk. = Preliminary Sketch
R. = Rear Elevation
R. Pl. = Roof Plan
Rt. Ele. = Right Elevation
Rt. Sd. = Right Side Elevation
S. , S. Ele. = South Elevation
Sc. = Sections
Sd. Ele. = Side Elevation
St. Ele. = Street Elevation
Sta. Sc. = Staircase Section
T. Sc. = Transverse Section
Topo. Mp. = Topographical Map
W. = West Elevation
